steps.title: Use the arc fraction
steps.content:
The arc is $60^\circ$ out of the full $360^\circ$ circle, so it is one-sixth of the circumference.
$$\frac{60}{360}=\frac{1}{6}$$

steps.title: Scale to the full circle
steps.content:
The $4$-inch arc is one-sixth of the full circumference $C$.
$$4=\frac{1}{6}C$$
$$C=24$$

steps.title: Match the circumference
steps.content: The circumference is $24$ inches. The answer is D.
